results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Frequency bands emerging in RoPE + θ-context-length interaction IS the 12-band RoPE frequency allocation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Group RoPE dimensions into frequency bands + per-band scale search for K/Q weights IS the 12-band per-band offset mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Head-specific or band-specific frequency assignment + EliteKV 75% KV reduction IS the per-head per-band 12-band allocation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Partition RoPE channels into log-spaced bands + per-band scaling IS the 12-band per-band allocation mechanism.
Per-band K/Q weight rescaling +14% perplexity improvement covers movable-bridge per-band offset mechanism.
Analytic study of base frequency RoPE + per-band sensitivity covers per-band allocation theory.
Comparative RoPE variants survey covers per-band positional encoding variants.
Per-band RoPE context extension + frequency-band scaling covers 2.5-octave bandwidth scaling.
